name: Jaha Bolibo Shotto Bolibo
overview: Public prosecutor Pritha Roy takes up the case of a police officer who is murdered on intervening in an eve-teasing incident. The accused are fellow officers, defended by top lawyer Joyraj Singha. As both lawyers try to prove a point, personal and professional twists threaten to engulf them both!
